name: Yokohama to Zurich Upgrade Workflow
serviceNowSurface: ATF for regression; Now Assist for Code as developer accelerator; manual cutover window
trigger: Upgrade lead initiates the upgrade cycle
businessOutcome: Move from Yokohama to Zurich with regression coverage on Now Assist surfaces and the top 30 business processes, a tested rollback rehearsal, and a 7-day post-cutover monitoring window.
steps: Build the deprecation calendar and confirm scope boundaries (scoped vs global).
Build the ATF regression suite for the top 30 business processes plus the three active Now Assist surfaces.
Build the LLM-as-judge harness for Guardian behavior delta.
Run the rollback rehearsal in sub-prod once and archive the result.
Run the upgrade in sub-prod; run the ATF suite and the LLM-as-judge harness; document any delta.
Risk reviewer sign-off on the deltas; remediate if needed.
Cut over to Zurich in prod within the documented window.
Run the audit retrieval rehearsal post-upgrade and the 7-day monitoring window.
approvalPoints: Risk reviewer sign-off on the LLM-as-judge harness rubric
Platform owner sign-off on the cutover window
Risk reviewer sign-off on Now Assist surface deltas
failureStates: ATF red on a top-30 process: cutover blocked; remediate and re-run.
LLM-as-judge out of tolerance on Guardian: cutover blocked; risk reviewer assesses.
Rollback rehearsal fails: cutover postponed until the rehearsal succeeds.
Audit retrieval rehearsal fails post-upgrade: declare incident and engage support.
auditNotes: ATF run history retained one year.
LLM-as-judge harness scores retained per release.
Cutover decision record archived with the platform owner sign-off.
tests: ATF suite green on the top 30 processes.
LLM-as-judge harness within tolerance on Guardian behavior delta.
Rollback rehearsal completes within the documented window in sub-prod.
Audit retrieval rehearsal completes within 24 hours post-upgrade.
No AI-generated code reaches prod without ATF and senior review.
